calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karen Farnsworth, #5162.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Meridianville Excavation, Inc.
Default entered against defendant on January 24, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at prove-up hearing issued on March 5, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Meridianville Excavation, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $55,302.80.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,121.00.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $460.00, for a total of $60,383.80.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-07-2008 Continued To Apr-03-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
